channel.title: App on LYon's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in App on LYon's Blog

item.title: OnceOne Privacy Policy
item.description:
At OnceOne, we prioritize your privacy and have designed our app with this core value in mind. Our approach is rooted in below key principle:

OnceOne does not store your tasks, notes, or personal data on external servers. All information is saved solely within a local database on your device. If you enable ​iCloud Sync, your data will synchronize securely across your personal Apple devices via your private iCloud account. This ensures your data remains under your control, accessible only to you.
